query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand extent

4.description: get buildings filtered to Kristiansand kommunenummer

5.description: compute distances between Kristiansand buildings and reduced storm-surge polygons

6.description: get minimum distance per building and keep building attributes

10.description: get county polygons and names to attach county info (will attribute-join later)
